response.justification: While Bogdan possesses over a decade of strong software engineering experience, including Staff-level roles and high-scale distributed systems design, he entirely lacks the domain expertise required for this specialized role. The position demands a Principal engineer to architect growth, experimentation, feature flagging, and telemetry platforms, none of which are present in his work history.
strengths: Extensive technical leadership and architectural experience across multiple Staff-level roles and as an open-source founder.
Proven ability to build and scale high-performance distributed systems, handling millions of requests per second.
Strong proficiency in required programming languages (JavaScript/TypeScript, C, C++, Java) and recent exposure to AI tooling.
concerns: Complete lack of demonstrated experience building experimentation frameworks, feature flagging, or A/B testing systems.
No evidence of work in growth engineering, telemetry foundations, or rollout-risk management.
Missing experience partnering with Data Science and Product to translate growth metrics into engineering platforms.
